author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Existing chebyshev::tests had only one integration test (integ_then_deriv_chebyshev) - a roundtrip that doesn't catch errors symmetric across deriv and integ. Integration constant was untested.

Added 7 tests pinning analytical antiderivative shapes and constant pass-through. ferray-polynomial: 167 -> 174 tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 437b4bd3.
